title: meliosma oldhamii var. oldhamii
intro: Meliosma oldhamii var. oldhamii, also known as Chinese meliosma, is a type of flowering plant in the family Alangiaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in Asian medicine, particularly in China, to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, often in combination with other herbs, to support overall health and well-being.
